requirement_topic.en: Product Safety, Performance & Market Access Certification
requirement_topic.zh: 产品安全、性能与市场准入认证
requirement_topic.zht: 產品安全、性能與市場准入認證

summary.en: US market access for water-electrolysis hydrogen generators is driven by mandatory legal obligations in OSHA rules, adopted electrical/fire/building codes, state pressure-vessel laws, and local AHJ permitting. Consensus standards such as ISO 22734, ISO 14687, ANSI/CSA B22734, NFPA 2, NFPA 70, and ASME BPVC are not standalone federal product mandates merely because they are named standards; they become controlling where incorporated by law, required by the adopted code or AHJ, used for OSHA/NRTL approval or listing, or imposed contractually. ISO 22734:2019 has been withdrawn and superseded by ISO 22734-1:2025 (ISO catalogue no. 82766). ANSI/CSA B22734:2023 is the North American adoption of ISO 22734 with US/Canada deviations and is a common NRTL listing basis for electrolyzer units, but an AHJ or NRTL may accept another appropriate standard or engineered approval route. Hydrogen purity for fuel-cell-vehicle applications is commonly specified against ISO 14687:2025 (superseding ISO 14687:2019), which defines Grade D contaminant limits for PEM fuel-cell road vehicles and adds Grade F for hydrogen internal-combustion engines; the legal or commercial need to meet it depends on the end-use rule, contract, or fueling-program requirement. Classified-location electrical equipment must satisfy the mandatory requirements of OSHA/adopted NEC provisions and AHJ approval; NFPA 70 Articles 500/501 or 505 provide the technical classification framework when adopted. Installation must satisfy adopted fire/building codes, NFPA 2 where adopted, and local AHJ permitting. Some states impose additional hydrogen-specific rules (e.g. California Fire Code Chapter 58). Pressure-bearing components must satisfy applicable OSHA, state, and local pressure-vessel requirements; ASME BPVC Section VIII and ASME U/UM stamping are the usual recognized pathway where those rules or the AHJ require them.
summary.zh: 美国水电解制氢设备的市场准入义务，来自 OSHA 规则、已采纳的电气/消防/建筑规范、州压力容器法规以及地方主管机构（AHJ）许可要求。ISO 22734、ISO 14687、ANSI/CSA B22734、NFPA 2、NFPA 70、ASME BPVC 等共识标准本身并非仅因被点名即成为独立的联邦产品强制标准；只有在被法律纳入、被已采纳规范或 AHJ 要求、用于 OSHA/NRTL 批准或列名认证，或被合同要求时，才成为相应项目的合规依据。ISO 22734:2019 已撤销，由 ISO 22734-1:2025（ISO 目录编号 82766）取代。ANSI/CSA B22734:2023 是含美国及加拿大差异的 ISO 22734 北美改编版本，常作为电解槽整机的 NRTL 列名认证依据，但 AHJ 或 NRTL 可接受其他适当标准或工程批准路径。燃料电池车辆应用的氢气纯度通常按 ISO 14687:2025（取代 ISO 14687:2019）规定，该标准以 D 级规定 PEM 燃料电池道路车辆的污染物限值，并新增适用于氢内燃机的 F 级；是否必须满足该标准取决于具体终端用途法规、合同或加氢项目要求。分类场所电气设备须满足 OSHA/已采纳 NEC 条款及 AHJ 批准等强制要求；NFPA 70 第 500/501 条或第 505 条在被采纳时提供技术分类框架。安装须满足已采纳的消防/建筑规范、被采纳的 NFPA 2 以及地方 AHJ 许可要求。部分州另有氢气专项规定（如加利福尼亚州消防法典第 58 章）。承压部件须满足适用的 OSHA、州及地方压力容器要求；在法规或 AHJ 要求时，ASME BPVC 第 VIII 篇及 ASME U/UM 钢印通常是被认可的路径。
summary.zht: 美國水電解製氫設備的市場准入義務，來自 OSHA 規則、已採納的電氣／消防／建築規範、州壓力容器法規以及地方主管機構（AHJ）許可要求。ISO 22734、ISO 14687、ANSI/CSA B22734、NFPA 2、NFPA 70、ASME BPVC 等共識標準本身並非僅因被點名即成為獨立的聯邦產品強制標準；只有在被法律納入、被已採納規範或 AHJ 要求、用於 OSHA/NRTL 批准或列名認證，或被合同要求時，才成為相應項目的合規依據。ISO 22734:2019 已撤銷，由 ISO 22734-1:2025（ISO 目錄編號 82766）取代。ANSI/CSA B22734:2023 是含美國及加拿大差異的 ISO 22734 北美改編版本，常作為電解槽整機的 NRTL 列名認證依據，但 AHJ 或 NRTL 可接受其他適當標準或工程批准路徑。燃料電池車輛應用的氫氣純度通常按 ISO 14687:2025（取代 ISO 14687:2019）規定，該標準以 D 級規定 PEM 燃料電池道路車輛的污染物限值，並新增適用於氫內燃機的 F 級；是否必須滿足該標準取決於具體終端用途法規、合同或加氫項目要求。分類場所電氣設備須滿足 OSHA／已採納 NEC 條款及 AHJ 批准等強制要求；NFPA 70 第 500/501 條或第 505 條在被採納時提供技術分類框架。安裝須滿足已採納的消防／建築規範、被採納的 NFPA 2 以及地方 AHJ 許可要求。部分州另有氫氣專項規定（如加利福尼亞州消防法典第 58 章）。承壓部件須滿足適用的 OSHA、州及地方壓力容器要求；在法規或 AHJ 要求時，ASME BPVC 第 VIII 篇及 ASME U/UM 鋼印通常是被認可的路徑。

standards_or_laws: ISO 22734-1:2025 — Hydrogen Generators Using Water Electrolysis Process: Industrial, Commercial and Residential Applications (supersedes ISO 22734:2019, which is withdrawn)

ISO 14687:2025 — Hydrogen Fuel Quality: Product Specification (supersedes ISO 14687:2019; Grade D: min. 99.97% mole fraction for PEM fuel-cell road vehicles with species-specific impurity limits; Grade F: added for H2 internal combustion engines)

ANSI/CSA B22734:2023 — Hydrogen Generators Using Water Electrolysis (North American adoption of ISO 22734 with US/Canada deviations; published by CSA Group; primary NRTL listing standard for electrolyzer units in the US and Canada)
ANSI/CGA G-5.4 — Standard for Hydrogen Piping Systems at Consumer Locations (piping standard; not the primary listing standard for electrolyzer units)
OSHA 29 CFR 1910.303 — Electrical Standards (requires NRTL listing for electrical equipment)
NFPA 2 (2023) — Hydrogen Technologies Code
NFPA 70 / NEC Articles 500, 501, 505 — National Electrical Code (classified-location electrical equipment in hydrogen generation areas)
ASME BPVC Section VIII Division 1 — Pressure Vessel Code (for pressure-bearing components if applicable)

NRTL listing (UL, CSA, Intertek, or equivalent) — required for electrical equipment; electrolyzer units listed to ANSI/CSA B22734:2023 or ISO 22734; AHJ may accept equivalent listing at its discretion

summary.en: In China, water-electrolysis hydrogen generators are designed and tested primarily against GB/T 19774-2005 (Water Electrolysis Hydrogen Production Equipment — General Technical Requirements), a recommended national standard for water-electrolysis hydrogen-production systems. No verified replacement PEM-electrolyzer equipment GB/T standard has been added here; unverified 2025 GB/T PEM electrolyzer numbers should not be treated as valid compliance references without confirmation in the official SAC/SAMR standards database. Note that GB/T 37244-2018 is NOT a PEM electrolyzer equipment standard — it is the fuel specification for proton exchange membrane fuel-cell vehicles (hydrogen fuel quality, not equipment). Hydrogen purity requirements for fuel-cell applications may use GB/T 37244-2018 as a fuel quality specification. Pressure vessels in the system must comply with TSG 21 (Safety Technology Supervision Regulation for Stationary Pressure Vessels) and bear the Chinese pressure vessel safety mark. Products subject to the CCC catalogue require mandatory certification; hydrogen-generation equipment itself is not currently listed under the CCC mandatory catalogue but may be subject to special equipment inspection by SAMR. [CCC applicability to integrated electrolyzer units should be confirmed with SAMR / CNCA if circumstances change]
summary.zh: 在中国，水电解制氢设备主要按 GB/T 19774-2005《水电解制氢设备通用技术要求》进行设计和测试，该标准为水电解制氢系统的推荐性国家标准。此处不再列入未经核实的 2025 年 PEM 电解槽 GB/T 标准编号；任何 2025 年 PEM 电解槽 GB/T 编号在未通过 SAC/SAMR 官方标准数据库确认前，不应作为有效合规依据。注：GB/T 37244-2018 并非 PEM 电解槽设备标准——该标准为《质子交换膜燃料电池汽车用燃料氢气》（氢燃料质量规范，而非设备标准）。燃料电池应用的氢气纯度可按 GB/T 37244-2018 作为燃料质量规范。系统中的承压容器须符合 TSG 21《固定式压力容器安全技术监察规程》并取得中国压力容器安全标志。列入 CCC 目录的产品须强制认证；制氢设备本身目前未纳入 CCC 强制目录，但可能须经市场监管总局特种设备检验。（如情况有变，CCC 对一体化电解槽设备的适用性须向市场监管总局/国家认证认可监督管理委员会确认）
summary.zht: 在中國，水電解製氫設備主要按 GB/T 19774-2005《水電解製氫設備通用技術要求》進行設計和測試，該標準為水電解製氫系統的推薦性國家標準。此處不再列入未經核實的 2025 年 PEM 電解槽 GB/T 標準編號；任何 2025 年 PEM 電解槽 GB/T 編號在未通過 SAC/SAMR 官方標準資料庫確認前，不應作為有效合規依據。注：GB/T 37244-2018 並非 PEM 電解槽設備標準——該標準為《質子交換膜燃料電池汽車用燃料氫氣》（氫燃料質量規範，而非設備標準）。燃料電池應用的氫氣純度可按 GB/T 37244-2018 作為燃料質量規範。系統中的承壓容器須符合 TSG 21《固定式壓力容器安全技術監察規程》並取得中國壓力容器安全標誌。列入 CCC 目錄的產品須強制認證；製氫設備本身目前未納入 CCC 強制目錄，但可能須經市場監管總局特種設備檢驗。（如情況有變，CCC 對一體化電解槽設備的適用性須向市場監管總局／國家認證認可監督管理委員會確認）

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19774-2005 — Water Electrolysis Hydrogen Production Equipment: General Technical Requirements (水电解制氢系统)
GB/T 37244-2018 — Hydrogen Fuel for Proton Exchange Membrane Fuel Cell Vehicles (质子交换膜燃料电池汽车用燃料氢气; NOTE: this is a hydrogen FUEL QUALITY specification, NOT a PEM electrolyzer equipment standard)
TSG 21-2016 — Safety Technology Supervision Regulation for Stationary Pressure Vessels (SAMR)
GB 150-2011 — Pressure Vessels (design standard)
CCC — China Compulsory Certification (3C; not currently applicable to standalone electrolyzer units; confirm with SAMR/CNCA if circumstances change)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 19774 electrolyzer testing and SAMR special-equipment approvals are not accepted as substitutes for US legal compliance, NRTL listing, AHJ approval, or state/local pressure-vessel approval. (Note: GB/T 37244-2018 is a hydrogen fuel quality standard for fuel-cell vehicles, not an electrolyzer equipment standard — it is not a comparable credential for US electrolyzer market access.) A US project typically needs an OSHA/AHJ-acceptable certification stack: equipment evaluated by an OSHA-recognised NRTL to ANSI/CSA B22734, ISO 22734-1, or another accepted standard; pressure-bearing components accepted under applicable ASME/DOT/state rules; installation compliant with adopted fire/electrical codes; and AHJ permits. Chinese GB/T standards and SAMR inspections carry no automatic mutual recognition in the US. A Chinese electrolyzer exporter should expect fresh NRTL evaluation and, where pressure vessels are in scope, a separate ASME or AHJ-accepted pressure-vessel pathway.
gap.zh: 中国 GB/T 19774 电解槽测试及市场监管总局特种设备审批，不能替代美国法律合规、NRTL 列名认证、AHJ 批准或州/地方压力容器批准。（注：GB/T 37244-2018 是针对燃料电池车辆的氢气燃料质量规范，而非电解槽设备标准——不构成美国电解槽市场准入的可比资质。）美国项目通常需要 OSHA/AHJ 可接受的认证组合：设备经 OSHA 认可的 NRTL 按 ANSI/CSA B22734、ISO 22734-1 或其他可接受标准进行评估；承压部件按适用的 ASME/DOT/州规则获得接受；安装符合已采纳的消防及电气规范；并取得 AHJ 许可。中国 GB/T 标准及市场监管总局检验在美国不自动享有互认地位。中国电解槽出口商应预期需要重新进行 NRTL 评估；如涉及压力容器，还需单独完成 ASME 或 AHJ 可接受的压力容器路径。
gap.zht: 中國 GB/T 19774 電解槽測試及市場監管總局特種設備審批，不能替代美國法律合規、NRTL 列名認證、AHJ 批准或州／地方壓力容器批准。（注：GB/T 37244-2018 是針對燃料電池車輛的氫氣燃料質量規範，而非電解槽設備標準——不構成美國電解槽市場准入的可比資質。）美國項目通常需要 OSHA/AHJ 可接受的認證組合：設備經 OSHA 認可的 NRTL 按 ANSI/CSA B22734、ISO 22734-1 或其他可接受標準進行評估；承壓部件按適用的 ASME/DOT/州規則獲得接受；安裝符合已採納的消防及電氣規範；並取得 AHJ 許可。中國 GB/T 標準及市場監管總局檢驗在美國不自動享有互認地位。中國電解槽出口商應預期需要重新進行 NRTL 評估；如涉及壓力容器，還需單獨完成 ASME 或 AHJ 可接受的壓力容器路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligations — OSHA rules, adopted electrical/fire/building codes, state pressure-vessel laws, and AHJ permits govern installation and workplace use. Named consensus standards such as ISO 22734-1, ISO 14687, ANSI/CSA B22734, NFPA 2/70, and ASME BPVC are not standalone federal product mandates; they are used when incorporated by law, required by the AHJ/adopted code, or selected for NRTL/listing or contractual compliance.
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary (GB/T 19774, GB/T 37244 are recommended standards); Mandatory for pressure vessels under TSG 21 (SAMR special equipment)

source.publisher: U.S. Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Chinese-manufactured water electrolyzer entering the US market must satisfy the mandatory legal framework for the specific installation: OSHA workplace requirements, adopted electrical and fire codes, AHJ permits, NRTL listing or approval acceptable to the AHJ, and applicable pressure-vessel rules. ISO 22734-1, ANSI/CSA B22734, ISO 14687, NFPA, and ASME documents are consensus standards or codes used through incorporation, listing, AHJ approval, or contract; they should not be described as independent federal product mandates. Chinese GB/T 19774 and TSG approvals do not create mutual recognition in the US. This information is provided for general reference only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国制造的水电解制氢设备进入美国市场，须满足具体安装场景下的强制法律框架：OSHA 工作场所要求、已采纳的电气和消防规范、AHJ 许可、AHJ 可接受的 NRTL 列名或批准，以及适用的压力容器规则。ISO 22734-1、ANSI/CSA B22734、ISO 14687、NFPA 和 ASME 文件属于通过法律纳入、列名认证、AHJ 批准或合同要求使用的共识标准或规范，不应表述为独立的联邦产品强制标准。中国 GB/T 19774 和 TSG 审批不构成美国互认。本信息仅供一般参考，不构成法律或合规建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國製造的水電解製氫設備進入美國市場，須滿足具體安裝場景下的強制法律框架：OSHA 工作場所要求、已採納的電氣和消防規範、AHJ 許可、AHJ 可接受的 NRTL 列名或批准，以及適用的壓力容器規則。ISO 22734-1、ANSI/CSA B22734、ISO 14687、NFPA 和 ASME 文件屬於通過法律納入、列名認證、AHJ 批准或合同要求使用的共識標準或規範，不應表述為獨立的聯邦產品強制標準。中國 GB/T 19774 和 TSG 審批不構成美國互認。本資訊僅供一般參考，不構成法律或合規建議。

requirement_topic.en: IRA Section 45V Clean Hydrogen Tax Credit and Buy America Requirements (Commercial Demand Drivers)
requirement_topic.zh: 《通货膨胀削减法》第 45V 条清洁氢生产税收抵免及美国制造要求（商业需求驱动因素）
requirement_topic.zht: 《通貨膨脹削減法》第 45V 條清潔氫生產稅收抵免及美國製造要求（商業需求驅動因素）

summary.en: IRA Section 45V (Inflation Reduction Act of 2022, Pub. L. 117-169) establishes a Clean Hydrogen Production Tax Credit of up to USD 3.00 per kilogram of qualified clean hydrogen produced at a qualified facility placed in service after 2022. The credit tier depends on lifecycle greenhouse-gas emissions intensity: Tier 1 (less than 0.45 kgCO2e/kgH2) qualifies for the full USD 3.00/kg; higher-emission tiers receive lower credits. Hydrogen must be produced for sale or use in a qualified trade or business. Treasury and IRS issued final regulations on 2025-01-10 (T.D. 10023, Federal Register document no. 2024-31513) specifying the lifecycle emissions methodology (45VH2-GREET model) and energy-attribute certificate (EAC) requirements for electrolytic hydrogen. Note: the 45V final rule was issued under the prior US administration; while the rule remains in force as of mid-2026, verify current IRS guidance at irs.gov for any subsequent amendments or regulatory action. Separately, the Buy America Act (41 U.S.C. 8301-8305) and related federal procurement rules require iron, steel, and manufactured products in federally funded projects to be domestically produced; DOE-funded hydrogen infrastructure projects (e.g. under BIL / IIJA H2Hubs) must comply with Buy America provisions.
summary.zh: 《通货膨胀削减法》第 45V 条（2022年，Pub. L. 117-169）设立清洁氢生产税收抵免，对2022年后投入使用的合格设施生产的合格清洁氢，最高抵免额为每千克3.00美元。抵免等级取决于全生命周期温室气体排放强度：第1档（低于0.45 kgCO2e/kgH2）可享受全额3.00美元/千克；排放较高档次的抵免额较低。氢气须为在合格贸易或业务中出售或使用而生产。财政部和国税局于2025年1月10日发布最终法规（T.D. 10023，《联邦公报》文件编号 2024-31513），明确了电解制氢的全生命周期排放核算方法（45VH2-GREET模型）及能源属性证书（EAC）要求。注：第45V条最终规则由前任美国政府颁布，截至2026年中期仍有效，如需了解后续修订或监管动态，请于 irs.gov 核实现行国税局指引。另外，《购买美国产品法》（41 U.S.C. 8301-8305）及相关联邦采购规则要求联邦资助项目中的铁、钢及制造产品须为国内生产；DOE资助的氢气基础设施项目（如BIL/IIJA氢能枢纽项目）须遵守购买美国产品条款。
summary.zht: 《通貨膨脹削減法》第 45V 條（2022年，Pub. L. 117-169）設立清潔氫生產稅收抵免，對2022年後投入使用的合格設施生產的合格清潔氫，最高抵免額為每千克3.00美元。抵免等級取決於全生命週期溫室氣體排放強度：第1檔（低於0.45 kgCO2e/kgH2）可享受全額3.00美元／千克；排放較高檔次的抵免額較低。氫氣須為在合格貿易或業務中出售或使用而生產。財政部和國稅局於2025年1月10日發布最終法規（T.D. 10023，《聯邦公報》文件編號 2024-31513），明確了電解製氫的全生命週期排放核算方法（45VH2-GREET模型）及能源屬性證書（EAC）要求。注：第45V條最終規則由前任美國政府頒布，截至2026年中期仍有效，如需了解後續修訂或監管動態，請於 irs.gov 核實現行國稅局指引。另外，《購買美國產品法》（41 U.S.C. 8301-8305）及相關聯邦採購規則要求聯邦資助項目中的鐵、鋼及製造產品須為國內生產；DOE資助的氫氣基礎設施項目（如BIL/IIJA氫能樞紐項目）須遵守購買美國產品條款。

standards_or_laws: IRA 2022 Section 45V — Clean Hydrogen Production Tax Credit (Pub. L. 117-169)

IRS / Treasury Final Regulations for Section 45V (T.D. 10023, published Federal Register 2025-01-10, document no. 2024-31513; effective 2025-01-10; regulatory status as of mid-2026: in force — verify at irs.gov for any subsequent amendments)
45VH2-GREET Model — DOE Argonne National Laboratory lifecycle emissions model for 45V
DOE National Clean Hydrogen Strategy and Roadmap (2023) — energy.gov
Buy America Act (41 U.S.C. 8301-8305) — domestic content requirement for federal procurement
BIL / IIJA Section 40314 — Regional Clean Hydrogen Hubs (H2Hubs) program, including Buy America requirements
DOE Loan Programs Office — Title XVII loan guarantees for hydrogen projects

summary.en: China does not have a direct equivalent to the IRA 45V tax credit. The Chinese government supports hydrogen production through industrial policy incentives under the 14th Five-Year Plan for hydrogen energy, NDRC and MIIT guidance documents, and local government subsidies (e.g. Guangdong, Beijing, Shanghai hydrogen demonstration zones). Green hydrogen production using renewable electricity is encouraged but there is no single lifecycle-emissions-based federal tax credit mechanism comparable to 45V. Buy America provisions have no equivalent in China; procurement of hydrogen equipment for state-owned enterprise projects may favour domestic suppliers under government procurement guidelines, but there is no explicit legal equivalent to the US statutory Buy America requirement. Specific subsidy programmes vary by province and policy cycle; verify current incentives with NDRC or the relevant provincial authority.
summary.zh: 中国没有与 IRA 第 45V 条税收抵免直接对应的机制。中国政府通过「十四五」氢能规划、国家发改委和工业和信息化部指导文件以及地方政府补贴（如广东、北京、上海氢能示范区）支持制氢产业。利用可再生电力生产绿色氢气受到鼓励，但尚无与 45V 类似的基于全生命周期排放的联邦税收抵免机制。中国没有与美国购买美国产品法等同的规定；国有企业氢能设备采购可能依据政府采购指引优先采用国内供应商，但并无与美国法定购买美国产品要求明确对应的法律规定。具体补贴计划因省份和政策周期而异，须向国家发改委或相关省级主管部门核实现行激励措施。
summary.zht: 中國沒有與 IRA 第 45V 條稅收抵免直接對應的機制。中國政府通過「十四五」氫能規劃、國家發改委和工業和信息化部指導文件以及地方政府補貼（如廣東、北京、上海氫能示範區）支持製氫產業。利用可再生電力生產綠色氫氣受到鼓勵，但尚無與 45V 類似的基於全生命週期排放的聯邦稅收抵免機制。中國沒有與美國購買美國產品法等同的規定；國有企業氫能設備採購可能依據政府採購指引優先採用國內供應商，但並無與美國法定購買美國產品要求明確對應的法律規定。具體補貼計劃因省份和政策週期而異，須向國家發改委或相關省級主管部門核實現行激勵措施。

standards_or_laws: NDRC / MIIT — Medium and Long-Term Plan for the Development of the Hydrogen Energy Industry (2021-2035)
NDRC Guidance on Hydrogen Energy Development (2022) — green hydrogen targets

Local government hydrogen demonstration subsidies (Guangdong, Beijing, Shanghai) — programme details vary by jurisdiction and policy cycle; verify current incentives with relevant provincial authorities
State-owned enterprise government procurement guidelines (favoring domestic suppliers) — not a statutory Buy America equivalent; no mutual recognition with US federal procurement rules

gap.en: The IRA 45V credit creates a powerful commercial incentive for US project developers to deploy clean-hydrogen electrolyzers that can demonstrate low lifecycle GHG emissions under the 45VH2-GREET model — specifically electrolyzers powered by additional, deliverable, time-matched renewable electricity. Chinese-manufactured electrolyzers can in principle qualify if the facility and project meet 45V requirements, but the Buy America provisions attached to federally funded H2Hubs and DOE loan programs may require domestically manufactured electrolyzer components, effectively excluding or disadvantaging Chinese-origin equipment in those project streams. Chinese subsidy mechanisms are fragmented, non-transferable to US projects, and carry no reciprocal recognition. A Chinese electrolyzer OEM targeting the US market must plan for 45V lifecycle-accounting documentation and assess Buy America exposure for any federally financed project.
gap.zh: IRA 第 45V 条税收抵免为美国项目开发商部署可在 45VH2-GREET 模型下证明低生命周期温室气体排放的清洁氢电解槽提供了强大的商业激励——尤其是以额外的、可交付的、时间匹配可再生电力驱动的电解槽。中国制造的电解槽在原则上可符合 45V 要求，但附加在联邦资助氢能枢纽和 DOE 贷款项目上的购买美国产品条款可能要求电解槽组件为国内制造，从而在这些项目渠道中对中国原产设备形成事实上的排除或劣势。中国的补贴机制分散、不可转移至美国项目，且不享有对等认可。以美国市场为目标的中国电解槽企业须为符合 45V 要求准备全生命周期核算文件，并评估任何联邦资助项目中的购买美国产品合规风险。
gap.zht: IRA 第 45V 條稅收抵免為美國項目開發商部署可在 45VH2-GREET 模型下證明低生命週期溫室氣體排放的清潔氫電解槽提供了強大的商業激勵——尤其是以額外的、可交付的、時間匹配可再生電力驅動的電解槽。中國製造的電解槽在原則上可符合 45V 要求，但附加在聯邦資助氫能樞紐和 DOE 貸款項目上的購買美國產品條款可能要求電解槽組件為國內製造，從而在這些項目渠道中對中國原產設備形成事實上的排除或劣勢。中國的補貼機制分散、不可轉移至美國項目，且不享有對等認可。以美國市場為目標的中國電解槽企業須為符合 45V 要求準備全生命週期核算文件，並評估任何聯邦資助項目中的購買美國產品合規風險。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary incentive — 45V is a tax credit, not a product mandate; Buy America is mandatory for federally funded projects only (not private-sector projects)
mandatory_status.cn: No direct equivalent — hydrogen subsidies are discretionary government incentives, not statutory mandates

source.publisher: U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) — Office of Energy Efficiency and Renewable Energy

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] IRA 45V is a commercial demand driver, not a product-safety mandate: it incentivises low-GHG electrolytic hydrogen but does not itself bar Chinese-manufactured electrolyzers from the US market. However, Buy America provisions on federally funded H2Hub and DOE loan projects may create de facto barriers for Chinese-origin equipment in those channels. Exporters should verify current IRS 45V final-rule requirements and assess project-by-project Buy America exposure. This information is provided for general reference only and does not constitute legal, tax, or regulatory advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] IRA 第 45V 条是商业需求驱动因素，而非产品安全强制要求：它激励低温室气体排放的电解制氢，但本身并不禁止中国制造的电解槽进入美国市场。但是，联邦资助氢能枢纽和 DOE 贷款项目的购买美国产品条款，可能对这些渠道中的中国原产设备形成事实上的壁垒。出口商应核实当前国税局第 45V 条最终规则要求，并逐项目评估购买美国产品合规风险。本信息仅供一般参考，不构成法律、税务或合规建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] IRA 第 45V 條是商業需求驅動因素，而非產品安全強制要求：它激勵低溫室氣體排放的電解製氫，但本身並不禁止中國製造的電解槽進入美國市場。但是，聯邦資助氫能樞紐和 DOE 貸款項目的購買美國產品條款，可能對這些渠道中的中國原產設備形成事實上的壁壘。出口商應核實當前國稅局第 45V 條最終規則要求，並逐項目評估購買美國產品合規風險。本資訊僅供一般參考，不構成法律、稅務或合規建議。
